title: FPS Info
description: FPS Info is a mod that shows summary of FPS the last 7 days.
body:
# FAQ

## Q: What is this mod about?
A: This mod shows FPS info of the last 7 days of playing Minecraft.

## Q: Which versions are supported?
A: Currently, only 1.21.11 is supported. More versions may be supported in the future.


Made by FarmCraft and Claude 2026.
